description_long: This is a striking green convertible sports car with a dynamic, angular body design and a bold lightning bolt graphic along its sides. The car features a low, aerodynamic profile, large green alloy wheels, and a rear spoiler for enhanced performance aesthetics. The front hood displays a prominent Porsche badge, while the rear includes a visible license plate and dual exhausts. The interior is open, revealing brown seats and a unique, stylized driver figure resembling an Android mascot. The car's surface is glossy and reflective, with black accents on the mirrors and trim. Overall, the vehicle exudes a high-performance, custom-modified appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A vivid green convertible sports car with lightning graphics, Porsche badging, and a glossy finish. The open interior and custom details give it a high-performance, urban-ready look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the lightning bolt graphic, green wheels, open cockpit, and Android mascot driver.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the Porsche badge, aerodynamic hood, and open seating area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the lightning graphic, wheels, and open interior.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the spoiler, dual exhausts, license plate, and the back of the Android mascot driver.
